    int n = s.length();

    if (n == 0) return 0;

    // compute prefix_L

    int[] prefix_L = new int[n + 1];

    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i + 1] = prefix_L[i] + (s.charAt(i) == 'L' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // compute suffix_T

    int[] suffix_T = new int[n + 1];

    for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i + 1] + (s.charAt(i) == 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // compute original count

    long original = 0;

    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s.charAt(i) == 'C') {

            original += (long) prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i + 1];

        }

    }

    // compute insert_L: sum_T_after_C

    long insert_L = 0;

    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s.charAt(i) == 'C') {

            insert_L += suffix_T[i + 1];

        }

    }

    // compute insert_T: sum_L_before_C

    long insert_T = 0;

    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s.charAt(i) == 'C') {

            insert_T += prefix_L[i];

        }

    }

    // compute insert_C: max(prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i+1] for i in 0..n)

    long insert_C = 0;

        if (current > insert_C) {

            insert_C = current;

        }

    }

    long max_increase = Math.max(Math.max(insert_L, insert_T), insert_C);

    return original + max_increase;
